sprint.goal: AG Studio Portfolio Framework + First Asset — define asset template, scoring system, governance rules; research Guitar Jam Partner architecture; propose 10 highest-ROI starter projects

assignments.studio-sr: PR #472 filed in agentguard-cloud — all checks green, ready to merge. Closes workspace#97 item 4 (final dashboard observability gap).

assignments.studio-designer: Continue gh-pages hero CTA improvement (blocked on writable gh-pages worktree — ops must enable).
assignments.workspace-config-validator: Audit all agents scheduled in 02:00–04:00 UTC window. Propose rescheduling to keep <10 agents per 30-min slot. Target: flatten daily quota cascade.
assignments.workspace-agent-reliability: Track agent success rates across last 24h. Continue root cause analysis for morning Claude API quota cascade.

blockers.description: gh CLI auth invalid in worktree environments for codex/gemini sandbox drivers. Copilot driver works fine (uses host ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml). PR #149 fixes missing sibling repo dirs.
blockers.action: Monitor — copilot failover is working. When codex quota restores (Apr 3), re-test codex in worktrees.

blockers.description: 7 open PRs in agent-guard failing lint + test-and-build CI (up from 5 last cycle). Blocking automated merges across kernel and cloud work.
blockers.action: Kernel squad: investigate shared CI regression — block is growing, escalation warranted

blockers.description: 29 agents hit Claude API daily quota in 02:00–04:00 UTC window causing morning cascade failures each day.
blockers.action: workspace-config-validator: audit 02:00–04:00 UTC scheduling density and propose rebalancing. OPS: action the rescheduling.
